titleStmt.title: SII 26.401: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 401. (A.R. No. 380 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 500 kuḻi of land as tax-free tirunāmattukkāṇi, to provide for offerings to the god Āḍavallār (i.e., Naṭarāja) in the temple of the god Tiruppulippagava-nāyaṉār of Śiṟṟiṅgūr in Kuṟukkaik-kūṟṟam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu, by the Śāliga-nagarattārs of Tirukkōvalūr residing in Marudūr alias Maduraikkuvāytta Perumāḷpuram, in the same nāḍu. It is stated that the gift-land was given to the Nagarattārs as Perumāḷkāṇi probably by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 Āvatu malāṭākiya jananātava
ḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikkūṟṟattu ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulippakavanāyaṉāṟku Iṉnāṭṭu marutūrāna ma
turaikkuvāyttaperumāḷpurattu tirukkovalūr nakarattārom Ikkoyil mutaliyār Āṭavallārke ciṟukālaiccantiyum Amu
tuppaṭikkuṭpaṭṭaveñcaṉattukkum viṭṭa naṉcai nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷukku perumāḷ kāṇiyāka prasātañceytaruḷi
na Immarutūrāna maturaikkuvāyttaperumāḷpurattu Iṉnāyaṉāṟku tirunāmattukkāṇi tiruppulippakavaṉukku Itaṟku
Iṉnāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi nilamaṟumāvukku meṟku paṉaṅkāṭṭuppuṟam taṭi Iraṇṭu kuḻi 5 100 Ikkuḻi Ainnūṟum kār
pācaṉam cittiraikkār Uḷḷiṭṭa payirkaḷ Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Uṭpaṭa candrāditya- van tirunāmattukkāṇi Iṟaiyiliyā
ka viṭṭom maturaikkuvāyttaperumāḷpurattu tirukkovalūr cālikanakāttārom Itu panmāheśvara
rakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 26.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
